case_title: RENE I MONJARAS VS. TRANSPORTES EL SALVADOR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANSPORTES EL SALVADOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,811.00 FILED BY MONJARAS, RENE I AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSPORTES EL SALVADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSA C. LOPEZ--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
